ddls:
CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_code" TEXT /* Short code for the region (e.g., 'an', 'ap', 'ar') */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Full name of the region */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the region */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the region in square kilometers */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the region's centroid */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the region's centroid */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the region's data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cases" (
  "case_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each case entry */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region where the case was reported */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the case (e.g., 'active', 'recovered', 'deceased') */,
  "confirmed" INTEGER /* Number of confirmed cases */,
  "recovered" INTEGER /* Number of recovered cases */,
  "deceased" INTEGER /* Number of deceased cases */,
  "total" INTEGER /* Total number of cases */,
  "confirmed_fraction" REAL /* Fraction of confirmed cases */,
  "recovered_fraction" REAL /* Fraction of recovered cases */,
  "deceased_fraction" REAL /* Fraction of deceased cases */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date when the case data was last updated */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group of the cases (e.g., '0-18', '19-60', '60+) */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the cases (e.g., 'male', 'female', 'other') */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the case data (e.g., 'government', 'healthcare provider') */,
  "vaccination_status" TEXT /* Vaccination status of the cases (e.g., 'fully vaccinated', 'partially vaccinated', 'not vaccinated') */,
  "symptoms_severity" TEXT /* Severity of symptoms (e.g., 'mild', 'moderate', 'severe') */,
  "is_travel_related" INTEGER /* Indicates if the case is travel-related */,
  "is_cluster_related" INTEGER /* Indicates if the case is part of a cluster */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cases_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "case_updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each case update */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the case entry */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date when the case data was updated */,
  "confirmed" INTEGER /* Number of confirmed cases at the time of update */,
  "recovered" INTEGER /* Number of recovered cases at the time of update */,
  "deceased" INTEGER /* Number of deceased cases at the time of update */,
  "total" INTEGER /* Total number of cases at the time of update */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group of the cases (e.g., '0-18', '19-60', '60+) */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the cases (e.g., 'male', 'female', 'other') */,
  "vaccination_status" TEXT /* Vaccination status of the cases (e.g., 'fully vaccinated', 'partially vaccinated', 'not vaccinated') */,
  "symptoms_severity" TEXT /* Severity of symptoms (e.g., 'mild', 'moderate', 'severe') */,
  "is_travel_related" INTEGER /* Indicates if the case is travel-related */,
  "is_cluster_related" INTEGER /* Indicates if the case is part of a cluster */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_updates_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES cases ("case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "case_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each case type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the case type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the case type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, researcher, healthcare professional) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level of the user (e.g., 'read', 'write', 'admin') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the case being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the case */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the case was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "device" TEXT /* Device used to access the data (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES cases ("case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the case triggering the notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date when the notification was sent */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., critical case, update) */,
  "message" TEXT /* Content of the notification message */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the notification (e.g., 'sent', 'failed') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES cases ("case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "case_fractions" (
  "fraction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fraction entry */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the case entry */,
  "confirmed_fraction" REAL /* Fraction of confirmed cases */,
  "recovered_fraction" REAL /* Fraction of recovered cases */,
  "deceased_fraction" REAL /* Fraction of deceased cases */,
  "age_group_fraction" REAL /* Fraction of cases by age group */,
  "gender_fraction" REAL /* Fraction of cases by gender */,
  "vaccination_status_fraction" REAL /* Fraction of cases by vaccination status */,
  "symptoms_severity_fraction" REAL /* Fraction of cases by symptoms severity */,
  "is_travel_related_fraction" REAL /* Fraction of travel-related cases */,
  "is_cluster_related_fraction" REAL /* Fraction of cluster-related cases */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fraction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_fractions_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES cases ("case_id")
)
